interpretation: Observed mean_k=10.7673 vs null median=13.2574 (95% CI [13.0941, 13.4208]). Observed is LOWER than null distribution; two-sided empirical p < 0.001 (extreme). One-sided P(null ≥ observed) = 1.0000; P(null ≤ observed) = 0.0000 (across 1000 trials, seed=42). Domain reading: observed mean_k LOWER than random shuffle baseline → sources cluster their GROUNDED claims onto FEWER distinct entities than uniform random assignment would predict.
